description.value: S3 Technic Pvt Ltd is a dedicated agricultural machinery manufacturer based in Noida. They specialize in producing a range of high-quality equipment designed to enhance farming efficiency and productivity for modern agriculture.

address.value: Unit No. F-123, Sector-8, Sector-8, Noida, Gautambuddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh, 201301

bio.value:
S3 Technics is a manufacturing start up created by two engineers from IIT Delhi and BITS Pilani. With over 20 years of experience in the field of engineering and manufacturing, we specialize in building special purpose automation machines and Laser land leveler (an electronic leveling machine for agricultural and construction purposes).
We have recently set a production unit for indigenous manufacturing of commutators which at present are largely being imported from China. 
Our Youtube channel will be dedicated to give our customers a view of our expertise and our past/present projects.

catalog_items.description: A new Bluetooth-enabled laser transmitter designed for agricultural use, specifically for laser land leveling. It features dual slope capabilities and can be controlled via a mobile application on your phone. The device is available in more than 10 colors.

specifications.colors: More than 10 colors (red, yellow, blue/teal shown)

social_source.caption:
A new tech in the market - Bluetooth Laser Transmitter controlled by your phone.
#techinnovation #agriculture #laserlandleveler #s3technics #farmer

catalog_items.description: A Bluetooth-enabled laser land leveler, likely used for precision leveling in agricultural fields. This product is indicated to be 'Made in India' and is part of agritech solutions.

A Bluetooth-enabled dual slope laser transmitter, designed for precision leveling in agricultural or surveying applications. It emits a laser beam and is available in over 10 colors, including red, yellow, and blue.

specifications.Colors: Available in more than 10 colors (e.g., red, yellow, blue)

catalog_items.description: A robust yellow agricultural machine, identified as an S3 Technics Laser Land Leveler, designed for precision land leveling. It features a sturdy frame, multiple wheels, hydraulic cylinders, and a mast for laser guidance, indicating its use in modern farming practices.

A complete laser leveling system by SST Technics, featuring an S3 Technic Bluetooth Laser Leveler, an LSR 360 receiver, and a Laser Santal control box. This system is designed for precision land leveling in agricultural applications.

The S3 Laser Leveller is an agricultural machinery product designed for land levelling, presented as a complete kit in a protective case. It includes the main leveller unit, a receiver, and other components. A key feature highlighted is its availability in 12 different colors.

catalog_items.description: This is a Bluetooth-enabled laser land leveller, controlled via a smartphone application. The app displays X and Y slope percentages and allows control over motor, power, and slope settings for precise land leveling.

The S3 laser land leveller is an agricultural machine designed for precise land leveling. It now features a new dual-axis slope setting, which can be controlled conveniently via a mobile phone app, enhancing ease of use and accuracy for farmers.

catalog_items.clean_name: Fully automatic machine for moulding and assembly of lamp bases
catalog_items.description: This fully automatic industrial machine is designed for the moulding and assembly of lamp bases. It features 60 stations, individual heaters with fault indication, and performs 100% component presence checking before moulding. The machine also includes rejection of faulty manufactured pieces and is operated via PLC & HMI.

catalog_items.raw_name: Automated Aerosol Pump and Tube Assembly Machine
catalog_items.clean_name: Automated Aerosol Pump and Tube Assembly Machine
catalog_items.description: This fully automated machine is designed to assemble aerosol pumps and their compatible tubes. It minimizes user intervention, requiring only the filling of the vibratory feeder with pumps and placing the tube roll. The entire assembly process, including uniform pump alignment, is automated to ensure correct assembly.
catalog_items.seo_title: Automated Aerosol Pump and Tube Assembly Machine
catalog_items.alt_text: Automated Aerosol Pump and Tube Assembly Machine

specifications.User Inputs: Fill vibratory feeder with aerosol pumps, keep tube roll in designated area
specifications.Function: Assemble aerosol pump and compatible tube

social_source.caption:
A fully automated machine to assemble the aerosol pump and it's compatible tube. 
The only user inputs required are to fill up the vibratory feeder with the aerosol pumps and keep the tube roll in the designated area. The entire process of assembly is fully automated including the vibratory feeder aligning the pumps in a uniformed manner to avoid any incorrect assembly. 
Watch the video for a complete look!

Reach out to S3 Technics for more information:

Website: https://www.s3technics.com
Email: s3technics@gmail.com
LinkedIn:   / s3-technics

catalog_items.raw_name: Fully Automatic Perfume Pump tube fitting machine
catalog_items.clean_name: Fully Automatic Perfume Pump tube fitting machine
catalog_items.description: This is a compact, fully automatic machine designed for fitting tubes into perfume pumps. It features a vibratory bowl feeder for precise pump alignment, adjustable tube length, and HMI/PLC-based automation for efficient production control. It can produce up to 90 pieces per minute, optimizing space on the shop floor.
catalog_items.seo_title: Fully Automatic Perfume Pump tube fitting machine
catalog_items.alt_text: Fully Automatic Perfume Pump tube fitting machine

specifications.Control Interface: HMI to show and set production count

social_source.caption:
A Fully Automatic Perfume Pump tube fitting machine designed to output upto 90 pieces per minute. A compact design ensures maximum output with minimum space on your shopfloor. 

Main Features:
• Vibratory Bowl Feeder to align pumps in correct orientation and minimise human effort 
• Adjustable tube length
• HMI to show and set production count
• PLC based automation
 
#perfume #diptube #automation #spm #s3 #perfumepump #assembly #machine #industry #pump #makeinindia #madeinindia #vocalforlocal

catalog_items.raw_name: S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller (Laser Samtal)
catalog_items.clean_name: S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller (Laser Samtal)
catalog_items.description: The S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller, also known as Laser Samtal, is a precision land levelling equipment. It utilizes an electronically levelled rotating laser plane as a reference, integrating a laser receiver, control box, and hydraulic system. This setup ensures the scraper blade edge remains parallel to a perfectly levelled laser plane for optimal land preparation.
catalog_items.seo_title: S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller (Laser Samtal)
catalog_items.alt_text: S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller (Laser Samtal)

specifications.Key Components: Laser receiver, control box, hydraulic system, scraper blade

social_source.caption:
Presenting the S3T manufactured Laser Guided Land Leveller. Our equipment is made in India ensuring highest quality and seamless after sales support. Check out more details on our website www.s3technics.com

Laser Land Leveller (also called Laser Samtal) is precision land levelling equipment. It utilizes an electronically levelled rotating laser plane as reference with laser receiver, control box and hydraulic system to maintain the scraper blade edge parallel to a perfectly levelled laser plane, thereby filling the tractor driven bucket with soil from high spots and releasing that soil to low spots of the field.

Land Levelling has multiple benefits, the prime among them being reduced use of water and better yield of crop. A Laser guided land leveler ensures precision leveling  upto 4mm. 

#laserlandleveler #lasersamtal #laserleveller #laserleveler #computermanjha #laserlevel #agritech #agriculture #haryana #punjab #andhrapradesh

plan_execution.reasoning: The seller has a good company profile, but no raw products are provided. Therefore, product-related agents (product, dedup) and media agent (which runs inside product agent) will be skipped. Reviews agent is skipped due to no reviews API URL. The focus will be on enriching the company profile and validating the phone number.
